title: nautochilus labiatus
intro: Nautochilus labiatus, also known as the 'Hooked' or 'Labiate Nautochilus', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Nautochilus labiatus include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and digestive issues. Nautochilus labiatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
